## Product Done Gate

- [ ] This change is backend-complete.
- [ ] This change is product-complete, or a follow-up issue is linked below.
- [ ] Relevant UI is visible to the user when workspace, queue, review, QA, merge, credential, or evidence behavior changed.
- [ ] Frontend changes were browser-verified.
- [ ] Delivery-critical behavior was proven with a real or representative configured project.
- [ ] Credential changes show redacted display, rotation or revoke, and no secret leakage.
